2606.19975.title: The Algorithmic-Human Manager: AI, Apps, and Workers in the Indian Gig Economy
2606.19975.paper_summary: This paper examines the impact of artificial intelligence and digital technologies on the blue-collar gig economy in India, focusing on algorithmic management. This paper examines the impact of artificial intelligence and digital technologies on the blue collar gig economy in India, focusing on algorithmic management he use of automated systems to allocate, monitor, and evaluate work in location-based services such as ride sharing and delivery. Using a social justice framework and a mixed-methods approach comprising interviews with 16 gig workers and 21 key stakeholders, the study uncovers a dual reality: while AI-powered systems expand access to work and generate operational efficiencies, they simultaneously introduce significant challenges related to fairness, transparency, and worker dignity. Key findings reveal that algorithmic systems are opaque by design, produce inequitable outcomes, and are not structured to reward additional labour with proportionate pay. The study advocates for a pragmatic hybrid governance model an Algorithmic Human Manager framework in which technological efficiency and human accountability operate together rather than in opposition. The findings carry implications for policymakers, platform companies, and civil society organizations working to design equitable AI governance frameworks for the gig economy in India and across the Global South.
2606.19975.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文探討了人工智慧和數位技術對印度藍領零工經濟的影響，重點在於算法管理。這篇論文探討了人工智慧和數位技術對印度藍領零工經濟的影響，重點在於算法管理，使用自動化系統來分配、監控和評估基於地點的服務工作，例如共享乘車和配送。使用社會正義框架和包含對16名零工工作者和21名關鍵利益相關者的訪談的混合方法，研究揭示了一種雙重現實：雖然AI驅動的系統擴大了工作機會並產生了操作效率，但同時也引入了與公平、透明和工人尊嚴相關的重大挑戰。關鍵發現顯示，算法系統在設計上是不透明的，產生不平等的結果，並且不會以相稱的薪酬來獎勵額外的勞動。該研究主張採用務實的混合治理模式，即算法人類管理者框架，在這種框架中，技術效率和人類責任共同運作，而不是對立。這些發現對於政策制定者、平台公司和民間社會組織在設計公平的AI治理框架以應對印度及全球南方的零工經濟具有重要意義。
2606.19975.author: Omir Kumar et.al.
